message: I've been feeling really down lately, nothing seems to bring me joy
I keep worrying about work deadlines and can't sleep properly
I miss my friends, I feel so alone sometimes
My coworker took credit for my project again, I'm so frustrated
I feel hopeless about the future, what's even the point
Had coffee this morning, trying to take it one day at a time
My dog did something funny today, it made me smile
I can't cope with all this pressure, I feel like I'm breaking down
I cried in the bathroom today, didn't want anyone to see
Went for a walk in the park, nature really helps clear my head
Another Monday. Just taking it slow today
I finished a painting I've been working on for weeks, really proud
